zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Scrope於1337年8月24日出生時，她的父親Sir Henry Scrope24歲，母親Joan21歲。她於1363年與Robert Plumpton IV在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年12月18日在英國英格蘭恩布利亞普倫普頓 沃爾享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Scrope was born on 24 August 1337, her father, Sir Henry Scrope, was 24 and her mother, Joan, was 21. She married Robert Plumpton IV in 1363, in Masham, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 18 December 1405, in Plumpton Wall, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Scrope est née le 24 août 1337, son père, Sir Henry Scrope, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Plumpton IV en 1363, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 décembre 1405, à Plumpton Wall, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Scrope am 24. August 1337 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Scrope 24 und ihre Mutter Joan 21. Sie hat 1363 in Masham, Yorkshire, England Robert Plumpton IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Dezember 1405 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Plumpton Wall, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Robert Plumpton IV nel 1363, nel Masham, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 dicembre 1405, nel Plumpton Wall, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Scropeが1337年8月24日に生まれた時，父Sir Henry Scropeは24歳，母Joanは21歳であった。1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムでRobert Plumpton IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年12月18日にイギリスイギリスクウンブリアプルンプトン ワルで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Scrope(이)가 1337년 8월 24일에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Scrope(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1363년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 Robert Plumpton IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 12월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 플럼프턴 월에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Plumpton IV em 1363, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Scrope родилась 24 августа 1337 г., её отцу по имени Sir Henry Scrope было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Plumpton IV в 1363 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 декабря 1405 г. в местности плумптон валл, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
